feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: Sociologist and PhD candidate at Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile. Executive Director of Corporación Moviliza. Research on homelessness, system justification, and inequality in Chile and Latin America.

entry.title: La violencia, no el frío, está matando a las personas en situación de calle

link.title: La violencia, no el frío, está matando a las personas en situación de calle

entry.content:
Opinion column published in El Mostrador (October 2025).

Read the full column →
entry.summary: Opinion column published in El Mostrador on violence as the leading cause of death among people experiencing homelessness in Chile.

entry.title: New paper: Presumed Deaths Among People Experiencing Street Homelessness in Chile

link.title: New paper: Presumed Deaths Among People Experiencing Street Homelessness in Chile

entry.content:
New paper published in the International Journal on Homelessness:

Presumed Deaths Among People Experiencing Street Homelessness in Chile: Analysis of Press-Reported Cases (2020–2025) in the Absence of Official Records

Co-authored with Alejandro Del Río.

Read the paper →
entry.summary: Published in the International Journal on Homelessness. Co-authored with Alejandro Del Río.

entry.title: Presentation at CCGH Halifax 2025
entry.content:
Presented findings from the IDRC-funded scoping review on street-involved youth in Latin America at the Canadian Conference on Global Health (CCGH) in Halifax (2025).

The review synthesises 193 studies across 7 country case studies.
entry.summary: Presented the Latin American scoping review on street-involved youth (193 studies, 7 country cases) at the Canadian Conference on Global Health.

entry.title: Interview: Al Pan Pan with Mirna Schindler (El Mostrador)

link.title: Interview: Al Pan Pan with Mirna Schindler (El Mostrador)

entry.content:
Multimedia interview with Mirna Schindler for Al Pan Pan, El Mostrador’s flagship program, discussing the housing crisis and homelessness in Chile.

Watch the interview →
entry.summary: Multimedia interview on the housing crisis in Chile, published in El Mostrador's Al Pan Pan program.

entry.title: La Tercera: El misterio del sociólogo y las muertes en situación de calle

link.title: La Tercera: El misterio del sociólogo y las muertes en situación de calle

entry.content:
Feature article in La Tercera (February 2024) on the research tracking deaths among people experiencing homelessness in Chile.

Read the article →
entry.summary: Feature article in La Tercera on the research behind the homelessness mortality registry in Chile.
